records.m_Talk_ENG: The enemy's momentum is fading!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The enemy's momentum is fading!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The enemy's momentum is fading!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Victory is in sight! Just hold!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Victory is in sight! Just hold!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Victory is in sight! Just hold!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But a question remains.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But a question remains.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But a question remains.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The entity we are most wary of has yet to reveal itself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The entity we are most wary of has yet to reveal itself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The entity we are most wary of has yet to reveal itself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something... is strange.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something... is strange.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something... is strange.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The monsters move as if they are receiving orders from someone, but that leader is nowhere in sight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The monsters move as if they are receiving orders from someone, but that leader is nowhere in sight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The monsters move as if they are receiving orders from someone, but that leader is nowhere in sight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps it has something to do with the High Priest setting out to the gelid lands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps it has something to do with the High Priest setting out to the gelid lands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps it has something to do with the High Priest setting out to the gelid lands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Merlin left the Stump?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Merlin left the Stump?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Merlin left the Stump?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have been able to maintain my sanity by borrowing the Stump's possibilities...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have been able to maintain my sanity by borrowing the Stump's possibilities...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have been able to maintain my sanity by borrowing the Stump's possibilities...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if I leave the Stump or the Stump's life comes to an end, I will become a monster like Marquis.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if I leave the Stump or the Stump's life comes to an end, I will become a monster like Marquis.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if I leave the Stump or the Stump's life comes to an end, I will become a monster like Marquis.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard High Priest Merlin has never set foot outside of the Stump since settling down here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard High Priest Merlin has never set foot outside of the Stump since settling down here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard High Priest Merlin has never set foot outside of the Stump since settling down here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This may be proof that the ordeal we face now is out of the ordinary.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This may be proof that the ordeal we face now is out of the ordinary.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This may be proof that the ordeal we face now is out of the ordinary.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kian... Um...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kian... Um...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kian... Um...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She headed east.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She headed east.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She headed east.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leave this place to us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leave this place to us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leave this place to us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sure?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sure?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sure?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As long as we are commanded to protect the Stump, we cannot disobey it so easily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As long as we are commanded to protect the Stump, we cannot disobey it so easily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As long as we are commanded to protect the Stump, we cannot disobey it so easily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, you are not bound by the rules of the Stump.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, you are not bound by the rules of the Stump.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, you are not bound by the rules of the Stump.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, I plead with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, I plead with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, I plead with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please help our High Priest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please help our High Priest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please help our High Priest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll return with Merlin, no matter what.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll return with Merlin, no matter what.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll return with Merlin, no matter what.
